summary: A Go-based testing and validation framework featuring a runner, schema validation, MCP handlers, and automated agent-generated test suites.
concerns: proliferation of agent-generated test directories (GOrchestra/glm-agents/*) cluttering the repository
uncommitted or partially staged changes in the working tree
potential redundancy between baseline and extra tests
heavy reliance on automated agent commits reducing human oversight
suggestions: consolidate or archive the GOrchestra/glm-agents directories to reduce repository noise
resolve the 2 modified and 1 staged file to maintain a clean git state
review extra tests for duplication against the baseline test suite
establish a cleanup workflow for merged agent session branches
